name: JiimSmith campaign board shows the pipeline kanban
description: With at least one seeded or previously created campaign, verify that a campaign opens on its Board with the current four pipeline columns, task owner stamps, timeline, calendar, and results tabs.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and go to the Campaigns view.
Open the first campaign in the list. If no campaign exists, start one from Home with the New campaign from an idea flow first.
Verify the campaign header shows the Campaign label, campaign name, optional Avg score, Run AI, Copy pack, and Board/Calendar/Results tabs.
Verify the Board tab shows kanban columns named Plan, Draft, In review, and Approved.
Verify at least one card is visible on the board and that cards carry an owner through a member name, avatar stamp, or assignee chip.
Verify the launch timeline renders above the kanban when schedule data exists.
Verify the month calendar and schedule/angle content render without errors.
Verify the results view renders without errors; an empty-state message is acceptable, but a crash or blank screen is not.
